response.justification: Strong general software engineering practices and proven ability to architect complex systems, but fundamentally mismatched on core technical requirements. Lacks Java/Kotlin expertise (primary focus on JavaScript/TypeScript for 5+ years), no Spring or enterprise framework experience despite explicit requirements, and minimal recent IDE tooling exposure. Would require substantial ramp-up time to meet the role's JVM-specific technical demands.
strengths: Deep expertise in clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship demonstrated across multiple roles and languages
Proven track record building high-scale, complex systems (e.g., Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/second)
Strong communication and mentorship skills evidenced by multiple workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: No strong Java or Kotlin expertise; 5+ years of recent work focused on JavaScript/TypeScript rather than JVM languages
No Spring ecosystem or enterprise framework experience (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) despite role requiring 'solid experience'
Limited recent IDE tooling or language internals work; only LabWindows/CVI experience from 2014-2015
